title: Fitting
description: Fitting: A fitting object used to describe interfaces between or along linear MEP elements.

Location.description: The point at which the Fitting occurs. Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

ConnectionsLocation.description: The points at which the Fitting physically connects to other MEP segments.

Type.description: The type of fitting connected to an element. FittingType: A type of fitting used to transition from one segment of linear MEP object to another.

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
